param.V_{pz}: voltage across piezo actuator in: alpha_g
param.n(P_{dtc}): number of samples; measure power in 'statistics'-mode

param.V_{pz}: voltage across piezo actuator in: alpha_g, error varied, max variance: 0.045
param.n(P_{dtc}): number of samples; measure power in 'statistics'-mode
param.tag: the measurement was performed interative, going from coarse to less coarse. The tag labels the interation

04-27-01-PI.description: We collect all the P-I characteristic data for various temperatures in order to characterize the laser diode. The piezo actuator voltage was active. It fluctuated and drifted with time. We have no knowlage on the mode-hop free range. We see that in a detailed scan the I_{thr} (dI_{pd}=0.2mA), does not pass the threshold, as expected from the coarse scan.
